title: Checkout spinner after login expires
body: Checkout keeps spinning after my session expires. I expected to be asked to sign in again, but the pay button never finishes.

title: Checkout hangs after idle cart
body: I left my cart open, came back later, and checkout froze on submit. No error message, just a loading state.

title: Expired session breaks payment submit
body: When my session times out, retrying checkout does not redirect to login. It just hangs forever.

title: Payment page stuck after timeout
body: The checkout page gets stuck if I was inactive first. Refreshing makes me log in again, but the original payment attempt never completes.

title: Checkout loading forever
body: Checkout loads forever after I return to an old cart. Expected session refresh or clear error.

title: Session expiry causes checkout freeze
body: Users report the final checkout button freezes after auth expires during cart review.

title: Password reset email missing
body: I requested a password reset three times and never received the email. I checked spam.

title: Reset link not arriving
body: Forgot password says email sent, but nothing arrives for our team accounts.

title: Cannot reset password
body: The reset password email is not showing up. Expected a link within a few minutes.

title: Password email delivery issue
body: Several users cannot log in because password reset messages never arrive.

title: Forgot password says sent but no email
body: Forgot password confirmation appears, but no reset link comes through.

title: Reset email delayed or lost
body: Password reset emails seem missing for our domain. We need account access restored urgently.

title: Uploaded file vanishes after refresh
body: I uploaded a PDF and saw it in the list, but after refreshing the page it disappeared.

title: Attachment disappears
body: Files show as uploaded until I reload. Then the attachment is gone from the project.

title: Document not saved after reload
body: The upload completed message appeared, but my document was missing after refresh.

title: Lost uploaded file
body: Our uploaded CSV disappeared after navigating away and coming back.

title: Upload does not persist
body: Uploaded files are visible temporarily but not persisted after page reload.

title: File gone from workspace
body: A spreadsheet upload vanished after refresh. This looks like data loss.

title: Dashboard slow for large account
body: The dashboard takes almost a minute to load for our account with many projects.

title: Analytics dashboard timing out
body: Dashboard widgets load very slowly for a large workspace. Some charts never finish.

title: Home dashboard performance problem
body: Our dashboard is painfully slow since adding more users and projects.

title: Dashboard hangs with many records
body: Large accounts see the dashboard hang while smaller accounts load fine.

title: Slow dashboard load
body: It takes 45 seconds before dashboard data appears. Expected under a few seconds.

title: Reports dashboard stuck loading
body: Dashboard reports keep spinning for our largest customer account.

title: Duplicate charge after retry
body: Checkout failed once, I retried, and my card was charged twice.

title: Charged twice on payment retry
body: The first payment attempt looked failed, but retrying caused two charges.

title: Duplicate billing after error
body: Payment showed an error so we tried again. Now there are two successful charges.

title: Retry payment creates duplicate charge
body: Retrying after the payment timeout produced duplicate billing.

title: Two invoices for one checkout
body: We received two invoices after clicking pay again when checkout failed.

title: Double charged after retrying card
body: Customer was charged twice when they retried a failed card payment.

title: Settings page broken on mobile
body: On mobile, the settings save button is off screen and fields overlap.

title: Mobile settings layout overlap
body: The settings page layout breaks on my phone. Labels and inputs overlap.

title: Cannot save settings on phone
body: In mobile view I cannot reach the save button on settings because the layout is cut off.

title: Settings responsive issue
body: Settings looks fine on desktop but broken on mobile widths.

title: Mobile settings page unusable
body: The settings form overlaps and the buttons are hidden on iPhone.

title: Settings form cropped on small screen
body: Small-screen settings page crops the notification controls.

title: Checkout stale login error
body: Checkout should recover when auth is stale, but instead the final step keeps loading.

title: Reset password never sends
body: Urgent: password reset link never reaches my inbox, blocking account access.

title: Upload lost after browser refresh
body: A file upload appears successful but disappears after browser refresh.

title: Duplicate payment on retry
body: Payment retry created a second charge for the same order.
